entry.title: [NFLNBC] Signs point to Aaron Donald return; Cardinals exec under investigation | PFT PM (FULL) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Mike Florio shares his thoughts on Aaron Donald seriously considering a return to the NFL and Los Angeles Rams before sinking his teeth into Cardinals executive Ryan Gold being under investigation by the Arizona Department of Gaming. Next, he gets into Christian Gonzalez waiting on Devon Witherspoon to sign a new deal before opening the Pandora's Box that consists of the ongoing ESPN layoffs.
